questions.question: What is the classification of the number $0$?
Which of the following numbers is an example of an odd integer?
Identify the next number in the pattern: $2, 5, 8, 11, 14$
A book costs $ $15$. If you have a $10$% discount coupon, how much will you pay for the book?
A bakery sells $480$ loaves of bread per day. If they pack $12$ loaves in a box, how many boxes do they sell per day?
Which of the following is equivalent to $-3 cdot -4$?
A water tank can hold $2400$ gallons of water. If $1200$ gallons of water are already in the tank, what percentage of the tank is filled? Show your work and explain your reasoning.

A group of friends want to go on a road trip that is $270$ miles long. If they drive at an average speed of $45$ miles per hour, how many hours will it take them to complete the trip? Additionally, if they leave at $8$am, what time will they arrive at their destination? Show your work and explain your reasoning.

teacher_rules: Tip 1: Encourage students to read the questions carefully and use the correct units.
Tip 2: Remind students to show their work and explain their reasoning for the free response questions.
Tip 3: Consider providing additional support for students who struggle with the concepts of integers and percentages.
